evidence_summary: Establish the group's transition from travelers to victors by confronting authority at the emerald city gates. The visual tone must balance the physical exhaustion and grime of the journey with the high-status demand for promised rewards.

Dorothy and her companions arrive at the Emerald City gates, triumphant after defeating the Wicked Witch. They confront the authorities, demanding to see the Wizard to claim the rewards promised to them.
The group approaches the gates, visibly travel-worn but triumphant.
A tense standoff between the travelers and the gate authority.
The group marches to the gates and demands an audience with the Wizard.
